CustomField.description: Displays the invoiced period end-date. Note that invoices for current month will not have value in InvoicePeriodEnd__c, it's always calculated here. InvoicePeriodEnd__c contains date for retroactive invoices.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL(InvoicePeriodEnd__c)), InvoicePeriodEnd__c, IF( NOT(ISNULL(ExpirationDate__c)), ADDMONTHS(DATE(YEAR(ExpirationDate__c), MONTH(ExpirationDate__c), 1),1)-1, null ) )
CustomField.label: Fakturaperiod slut
